title: View Rack Information By Changing The Display And Reselecting The Same Cell
summary: Change the display setting referenced in the training segment, then select the same cell again to show rack information for that cell.
when_to_use: Use when viewing a cell in the OptiSweep display and you need the interface to show rack information for that same cell, as described in the training segment.
not_for: Do not use as a fully specified control-navigation procedure when the exact display control or mode label must be known; the source does not identify that control.
Do not use if you need a source-confirmed sequence beyond changing the display setting and reselecting the same cell.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Change the display setting, reselect the same cell, and verify whether rack information appears.

safety_notes: The source provides no physical safety hazards or lockout requirements for this display interaction.
Use caution because the exact control being changed is not named in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the display or screen where cells can be selected

access_required: Access to the OptiSweep display or screen where cells can be selected
system_preconditions: A cell is available to select on the display.
The relevant display setting can be changed, although the exact control is not identified in the source.

visual_references.description: Training video frame near the spoken instruction about changing the display and reselecting the same cell to show rack information.

steps.title: Change the display setting
steps.purpose: Switch the display context referenced by the training so the cell can be reselected for rack information.
steps.instruction: Change the displayed setting referred to in the training segment.
steps.expected_result: The display setting is changed from its prior state.
steps.healthy_condition: The display reflects that a different setting or mode has been selected.
steps.failure_condition: The operator cannot identify or change the referenced display setting from the available source information.

actions.label: Change display setting
actions.exact_action: Change the displayed setting referred to in the training segment.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The training frame near the transcript statement about changing the display before selecting the same cell again.

stop_or_escalate_if: The exact control or mode label to change is not identifiable from the source.
The display setting cannot be changed as expected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'If you change this and you select the same cell, it'll show you the rack information.'

steps.title: Reselect the same cell
steps.purpose: Trigger the display to show rack information for the already identified cell.
steps.instruction: Select the same cell again after changing the display setting.
steps.expected_result: The same cell is reselected under the changed display setting.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface accepts the repeated selection of the same cell.
steps.failure_condition: The same cell cannot be reselected or the selection does not register.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the frame as contextual support for the instruction to reselect the same cell after changing the display.

stop_or_escalate_if: The same cell cannot be identified with confidence.
The interface does not register the repeated cell selection.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'If you change this and you select the same cell, it'll show you the rack information.'

steps.title: Verify rack information is shown
steps.purpose: Confirm that the display now shows rack information for the selected cell.
steps.instruction: Observe whether the display shows the rack information for that cell.
steps.expected_result: The selected cell displays rack information.
steps.healthy_condition: Rack information is visible for the selected cell after the display change and reselection.
steps.failure_condition: Rack information does not appear for the selected cell.

actions.label: Observe rack information
actions.exact_action: Observe whether the display shows the rack information for that cell.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference the nearby training frame while verifying whether rack information appears after reselecting the cell.

stop_or_escalate_if: Rack information does not appear after changing the display and reselecting the same cell.
Additional source guidance is needed because the source does not identify the exact control being changed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'If you change this and you select the same cell, it'll show you the rack information.'

success_criteria: After changing the display setting and reselecting the same cell, the selected cell displays rack information.
healthy_conditions: The display setting can be changed.
The same cell can be selected again.
Rack information becomes visible for the selected cell.
failure_conditions: The exact display control or mode label cannot be identified from the source.
Changing the display and reselecting the same cell does not show rack information.
The interface does not clearly indicate that the same cell was reselected.
escalation_guidance: Seek additional source guidance or SME clarification if the exact display control being changed is unclear.
Escalate if changing the display and reselecting the cell does not show rack information.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Training frame near the transcript statement describing the display change and same-cell reselection behavior.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'If you change this and you select the same cell, it'll show you the rack information.'

missing_details: The source does not name the exact control, button, or mode label that must be changed.

The source does not specify timing, permissions, or role boundaries beyond likely operator use.
